titleStmt.title: SII 27.189: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 189. (A.R. No. 70 of 1943-44.) SAṆḌŪR, SANDUR TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab (No. 3) lying in the compound of the local court.

This records the remission of siddhāya and kāṇike taxes, levied on the barbers of the sīme, to Timmōja and Koṇḍōja of Chippagēri and also Śivanōja of Soṇḍūru-sīme, by mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rāmarājadēvamahā-arasu, at the command of the king.

It is dated Śaka 1446, Krōdhi, Chaitra śu. 10, The Śaka year cited appears to be a mistake for 1466 which corresponded with the cyclic year Krōdhi. The tithi fell on 1544 A.D., April 3. But in the absence of the weekday the details are insufficient for verification.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaru
ṣa 1446 neya krōdhi saṁvatsarada caitra śu 10
mi śrī manmahārājādhirāja rāja paramēsvara śrī vīrapratāpa
vīra sadāsivadēva mahārāyara nirūpadiṁdalu śrī manmahā maṁ
ḍaḷēsvara rāmarāja dēvamahā Arasugaḷu naṁmakarisi cippa
gēriya tiṁmōja koṁḍōjanavarige meci pālisida viva
ra sīmeyoḷage nāyiṁdaru teruva sidāya kāṇike
Ellavanū sarvamānyavāgi pālisibiṭeU soṁ
ḍūra sīmege saluva nāyiṁdara sivanōjage
vaṁśapāraṁpareyalu sarvvamānyayida
ku tappikoṁḍare sāluṁdara makkaḷu . śrī
Digital edition of SII 27.189 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
